sectionTitle: I Work Part-time. I Teach French.

samples.meaning: to hire out for work; to work part time; to do manual work (for sb, usu. temporarily)
samples.pinyin: tā měitiān fàngxué hòu qù dǎgōng.
samples.en: He works part-time after school every day.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đi làm thêm sau giờ học mỗi ngày.

samples.meaning: to hire out for work; to work part time; to do manual work (for sb, usu. temporarily)
samples.pinyin: tā zhōumò zài kāfēi diàn dǎgōng.
samples.en: She works part-time at a coffee shop on weekends.
samples.vi: Cô ấy cuối tuần làm thêm ở quán cà phê.

samples.sentence: 主任正在安排新的項目。
samples.pinyin: zhǔrèn zhèngzài ānpái xīn de xiàngmù.
samples.en: The director is arranging a new project.
samples.vi: Trưởng phòng đang sắp xếp dự án mới.

samples.pinyin: nǐ kěyǐ zhíjiē liánxì zhǔrèn.
samples.en: You can contact the director directly.
samples.vi: Bạn có thể liên hệ trực tiếp chủ nhiệm.

samples.pinyin: nín néng jièshào yīxià chángchéng ma?
samples.en: Can you introduce a bit about the Great Wall?
samples.vi: Ông có thể giới thiệu vài nét về Trường Thành không?

samples.sentence: 我來介紹一下我的朋友。
samples.pinyin: wǒ lái jièshào yīxià wǒ de péngyǒu.
samples.en: Let me introduce my friend.
samples.vi: Tôi giới thiệu chút về bạn của tôi.

samples.pinyin: wǒ bǐ tā xiǎo liǎng suì.
samples.en: I'm two years younger than him.
samples.vi: Tớ nhỏ hơn anh ấy hai tuổi.

samples.sentence: 攜來百侶曾遊, 憶往昔崢嶸歲月稠。(毛澤東)
samples.pinyin: xié lái bǎi lǚ céng yóu, yì wǎngxī zhēngróngsuìyuè chóu.
samples.en: I was here with a throng of companions, ｜vivid yet those crowded months and years.

samples.pinyin: lǐlùn yǔyánxué
samples.en: Theoretical linguistics

samples.pinyin: yìngyòng yǔyánxué
samples.en: Applied linguistics

samples.pinyin: wǒ yǒu huà huà de jīngyàn.
samples.en: I have painting experience.
samples.vi: Tôi có kinh nghiệm vẽ tranh.

samples.pinyin: tā de jīngyàn hěn yǒuyòng.
samples.en: Her experience is very useful.
samples.vi: Kinh nghiệm của cô ấy rất hữu ích.

items.en: to talk over, to talk about, to discuss

samples.pinyin: tā tánle zìjǐ de kànfǎ.
samples.en: He talked about his own opinion.
samples.vi: Anh ấy nói về quan điểm của mình.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen hǎo hāor tán tán.
samples.en: Let's have a good talk.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen dāng zūnshǒu jiāotōng guīzé.
samples.en: We must obey traffic rules.
samples.vi: Chúng ta phải tuân thủ luật giao thông.

samples.pinyin: nǐ dāng ànshí wánchéng rènwù.
samples.en: You must complete the task on time.
samples.vi: Bạn phải hoàn thành nhiệm vụ đúng hạn.

samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒ de zhùjiào.
samples.en: She is my teaching assistant.
samples.vi: Cô ấy là trợ giảng của tôi.

samples.pinyin: tā gāng chéngwéi zhùjiào.
samples.en: She just became a teaching assistant.
samples.vi: Cô ấy vừa trở thành trợ giảng.

samples.pinyin: shàngwǔ tiānqì zěnme yàng?
samples.en: What's the weather like in the morning?
samples.vi: Thời tiết buổi sáng như thế nào?

samples.sentence: 他上午經常騎馬齣去兜一圈。
samples.pinyin: tā shàngwǔ jīngcháng qímǎ chūqù dōu yī quān.
samples.en: He goes for a ride most mornings.

samples.pinyin: chúle wǒ, tāmen dōu qùle.
samples.en: Except for me, they all went.
samples.vi: Ngoài tôi ra thì bọn họ đều đã đi.

samples.pinyin: chúle nǐ, wǒmen dōu zhīdàole.
samples.en: Apart from you, we all already know.
samples.vi: Ngoài bạn ra thì chúng tôi đều biết hết rồi.

samples.pinyin: wǒ zhèngzài sān niánjí xuéxí.
samples.en: I am studying in the third grade.

samples.pinyin: xiǎo hóng dōu shàng sān niánjíle.
samples.en: Xiao Hong has already gone to the third grade.
samples.vi: Tiểu Hồng đã lên lớp 3 rồi.

samples.pinyin: màncháng de shǔjià jiéshù le.
samples.en: The long summer vacation is over.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān shǔjià qù hǎibiān.
samples.en: I like going to the seaside in summer vacation.
samples.vi: Tôi thích đi biển vào kỳ nghỉ hè.

samples.sentence: 老師，我想請教一個問題。
samples.pinyin: lǎoshī, wǒ xiǎng qǐngjiào yīgè wèntí.
samples.en: Sir, I would like to ask a question.

samples.sentence: 您好，我想請教您一件事。
samples.pinyin: nín hǎo, wǒ xiǎng qǐngjiào nín yī jiàn shì.
samples.en: Hi, I want to ask you one thing.

samples.sentence: 高爾夫是一項昂貴的運動。
samples.pinyin: gāo'ěrfū shì yī xiàng ángguì de yùndòng.
samples.en: Golf is an expensive sport.

samples.pinyin: Tài guì le, mǎi bù qǐ.
samples.en: It’s too expensive. I can’t afford it.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen de xīnshuǐ yīyàng.
samples.en: Our salaries are the same.

samples.pinyin: zhè fèn gōngzuò xīnshuǐ dī.
samples.en: This job has low pay.

samples.pinyin: yùsuàn bāokuò suǒyǒu fèiyòng.
samples.en: The budget includes all expenses.
samples.vi: Dự toán bao gồm tất cả chi phí.

samples.pinyin: zhūsuàn shì chuántǒng fāngfǎ.
samples.en: Abacus calculation is a traditional method.
samples.vi: Bàn tính là phương pháp truyền thống.

samples.meaning: according to; in accordance with; in the light of; on the basis of
samples.pinyin: wǒ huì ànzhào shíjiān biǎo gōngzuò.
samples.en: I will work according to the schedule.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ làm việc theo lịch trình.

samples.meaning: according to; in accordance with; in the light of; on the basis of
samples.pinyin: tā ànzhào jìhuà wánchéng rènwù.
samples.en: He completed the task according to the plan.

samples.pinyin: lǐ jiàoshòu shuōhuà fēicháng yōumò.
samples.en: Professor Ly is very humorous in speech.

samples.sentence: 他是牛津大學一位教授的兒子。
samples.pinyin: tā shì niújīn dàxué yī wèi jiàoshòu de érzǐ.
samples.en: He's the son of an Oxford professor.

samples.pinyin: tā de liǎn shàng yǒu hàn diǎn.
samples.en: There are drops of sweat on her face.

samples.pinyin: dìshàng yǒu jǐ dī yóu diǎn.
samples.en: There are a few drops of oil on the ground.

samples.pinyin: bǎ zhè kuāng táo fēnchéng shí děng fèn.
samples.en: Divide this basket of peaches into ten equal parts.

samples.sentence: 他的市場份額不斷高漲。
samples.pinyin: tā de shìchǎng fèn'é bùduàn gāozhàng.
samples.en: His market share keeps rising.
samples.vi: Thị phần của anh không ngừng tăng.

samples.pinyin: fǎ lǜ miàn qián rén rén píng děng.
samples.en: Everyone is equal before (under) the law.
samples.vi: Mọi người đều bình đẳng trước pháp luật.

samples.pinyin: fǎlǜ jìnzhǐ dàoqiè xíngwéi.
samples.en: Theft is prohibited by law.
samples.vi: Pháp luật cấm hành vi trộm cắp.

samples.sentence: 這件衣服太貴，我買夠了。
samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfu tài guì, wǒ mǎi gòule.
samples.en: This piece of clothing is too expensive, I've bought enough.
samples.vi: Cái áo này quá đắt, tôi đã mua đủ rồi.

samples.sentence: 他説的話我聽夠了，不想再聽。
samples.pinyin: tā shuō dehuà wǒ tīng gòule, bùxiǎng zài tīng.
samples.en: I've heard enough of what he said, I don't want to listen anymore.
samples.vi: Những gì anh ấy nói tôi đã nghe đủ rồi, không muốn nghe thêm.

samples.pinyin: nǐ zhīqián xiěguò lǚlì biǎo ma?
samples.en: Have you ever written a resume before?
samples.vi: Bạn đã từng viết sơ yếu lý lịch chưa?

samples.pinyin: wǒ zhè fèn lǚlì biǎo zěnme yàng?
samples.en: What do you think of my resume?
samples.vi: Sơ yếu lý lịch của tôi như thế nào?

items.vi: phỏng vấn / trao đổi trực tiếp

samples.meaning: speak in person; speak face-to-face; take up a matter with sb. personally
samples.pinyin: tā xiǎng gēn wǒ miàntán yīxià.
samples.en: He wants to speak with me in person.

samples.meaning: speak in person; speak face-to-face; take up a matter with sb. personally
samples.pinyin: miàntán hòu wǒ huì gěi nǐ huífù.
samples.en: I will reply to you after the face-to-face discussion.

samples.pinyin: tā de fùmǔ shì huáqiáo.
samples.en: Her parents are overseas Chinese.
samples.vi: Bố mẹ của cô ấy là người Hoa kiều.

samples.pinyin: huáqiáo bāngzhù jiāxiāng fāzhǎn.
samples.en: Overseas Chinese help the development of their hometown.
samples.vi: Người Hoa kiều giúp quê hương phát triển.

samples.sentence: 他是我們廠的辦公室主任。
samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒmen chǎng de bàngōngshì zhǔrèn.
samples.en: He is the office director of our factory.

samples.sentence: 我去留學生辦公室辦手續。
samples.pinyin: wǒ qù liúxuéshēng bàngōngshì bàn shǒuxù.
samples.en: I went to the international student office to handle the procedures.

samples.sentence: 他正在跟幾個衕學談話。
samples.pinyin: tā zhèngzài gēn jǐ gè tóngxué tánhuà.
samples.en: He is talking with a few classmates.

samples.pinyin: wǒ zhǐ gēn tā tánguò jǐ cì huà.
samples.en: I have only talked with him a few times.

samples.meaning: situation; condition; circumstances; state of affairs
samples.pinyin: xiànzài de qíngxíng hěn fùzá.
samples.en: The current situation is very complicated.
samples.vi: Tình hình hiện tại rất phức tạp.

samples.meaning: situation; condition; circumstances; state of affairs
samples.sentence: 他沒告訴我真實的情形。
samples.pinyin: tā méi gàosù wǒ zhēnshí de qíngxíng.
samples.en: He didn’t tell me the real situation.
samples.vi: Anh ấy không nói cho tôi tình hình thực sự.

samples.sentence: 這個工作正適閤你的才/纔能。
samples.pinyin: zhège gōngzuò zhèng shìhé nǐ de cáinéng.
samples.en: The job is right down your alley.

samples.sentence: 那片子非常適閤孩子們看。
samples.pinyin: nà piànzi fēicháng shìhé háizimen kàn.
samples.en: That film is very suitable for children.

samples.pinyin: tā shuōmíngle lízhí de lǐyóu.
samples.en: He explained the reason for leaving his job.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đã giải thích lý do nghỉ việc.

samples.sentence: 老師詳細地説明了這道題。
samples.pinyin: lǎoshī xiángxì de shuōmíngle zhè dào tí.
samples.en: The teacher explained this problem in detail.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu xǐshù.
samples.en: I wake up first, then brush my teeth and wash my face.

samples.sentence: 先研究一下，然後再決定。
samples.pinyin: xiān yánjiū yīxià, ránhòu zài juédìng.
samples.en: First, research a bit, then make a decision.
samples.vi: Trước tiên phải nghiên cứu, sau đó mới quyết định.

samples.pinyin: yuèdǐ wǒmen yào tíjiāo bàogào.
samples.en: We need to submit the report by the end of the month.

samples.pinyin: gōngsī yuèdǐ huì fā gōngzī.
samples.en: The company will pay salaries at the end of the month.

samples.pinyin: tāmen zuótiān fā jiǎngle.
samples.en: They gave out awards yesterday.

samples.pinyin: gōngsī jīntiān fā huòle.
samples.en: The company shipped the goods today.

samples.meaning: immediately; at once; straight away; right away; at the drop of a (the) hat
samples.pinyin: wǒ mǎshàng jiù dào gōngsīle.
samples.en: I will be at the company right away.

samples.meaning: immediately; at once; straight away; right away; at the drop of a (the) hat
samples.pinyin: huìyì mǎshàng yào kāishǐle.
samples.en: The meeting is about to start immediately.

items.en: to accept / to promise / to agree

samples.meaning: to answer; to reply; to respond
samples.sentence: 媽媽叫你呢，快答應一聲！
samples.pinyin: māma jiào nǐ ne, kuài dāying yīshēng!
samples.en: Mom is calling you, quickly respond!

samples.meaning: to answer; to reply; to respond
samples.sentence: 我叫了他幾次，但他沒答應。
samples.pinyin: wǒ jiàole tā jǐ cì, dàn tā méi dāying.
samples.en: I called him a few times, but he didn't respond.

samples.meaning: smoothly; successfully; plain sailing; smooth going; without a hitch
samples.pinyin: shǒushù jìnxíng de shùnlì.
samples.en: The operation was plain sailing.

samples.meaning: smoothly; successfully; plain sailing; smooth going; without a hitch
samples.pinyin: gōngzuò zhèngzài shùnlì jìnxíng.
samples.en: The work is going on smoothly.

samples.pinyin: tā chuānle yītiáo huáng qúnzi.
samples.en: She wore a yellow skirt.

samples.pinyin: tā xǐhuan huángsè de yīfu.
samples.en: He likes yellow clothes.
samples.vi: Anh ấy thích mặc quần áo màu vàng.

samples.pinyin: wǒ huì shuō yī diǎn fǎ wén la
samples.en: I can speak a little French.

samples.sentence: 你們美國人就是沒辦法説好法文。
samples.pinyin: nǐmen měiguó rén jìushì méi bànfǎ shuōhǎo fǎwén
samples.en: You Americans always butcher the French language.

samples.sentence: 他在亞洲許多地方旅行過。
samples.pinyin: tā zài yàzhōu xǔduō dìfāng lǚxíngguò.
samples.en: He has travelled widely in Asia.

samples.sentence: 亞洲是世界上最大的洲。
samples.pinyin: yàzhōu shì shìjiè shàng zuìdà de zhōu.
samples.en: Asia is the largest continent in the world.
samples.vi: Châu Á là châu lục lớn nhất thế giới.

samples.pinyin: lǎoshī huì shuō xībānyá yǔ.
samples.en: The teacher can speak Spanish.

samples.pinyin: tā jīngtōng xībānyá yǔ.
samples.en: She is proficient in Spanish.
samples.vi: Cô ấy tinh thông tiếng Tây Ban Nha.

samples.pinyin: wǒ huì shuō yīngwén.
samples.en: I can speak English.

samples.pinyin: tā de yīngwén hěn hǎo.
samples.en: His English is very good.

samples.pinyin: měi-chǒu
samples.en: Beauty and ugliness

samples.pinyin: xīnlíngměi
samples.en: Inner beauty

samples.sentence: 我真沒想到會是這樣的。
samples.pinyin: wǒ zhēn méi xiǎngdào huì shì zhèyàng de.
samples.en: I never thought it would turn out like this.
samples.vi: Tôi thật sự không ngờ lại như vậy.

samples.sentence: 我沒想到他們會在這裡/裏。
samples.pinyin: wǒ méi xiǎngdào tāmen huì zài zhèlǐ.
samples.en: I didn't expect to see them here.

samples.pinyin: xiǎo hóng dōu shàng sān niánjíle.
